title: pedicularis debilis subsp. debilis
intro: Pedicularis debilis subsp. debilis, also known as Himalayan lousewort, is a flowering plant species in the bumblebee balm family, Pedicularis. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including phenolic acids and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pedicularis debilis subsp. debilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
